name: Devlyn 3 Light 62" Floor Lamp - FLL4104 - Gold - Safavieh
description: Introducing the Devlyn floor lamp, a striking addition to any room. With its sleek, gold finish and sturdy metal construction, this 62 inch marvel combines elegance and functionality. Featuring three lights, it beautifully illuminates your space, creating a cozy and inviting atmosphere. Designed to complement any decor, the Devlyn lamp stands as a testament to modern style and charm. Its minimalist design does not compromise on impact, providing a focal point that enhances your living area or office. Easy to fit in any corner or next to your favorite reading chair, the Devlyn floor lamp is the perfect way to refresh your lighting setup. Enjoy the glow and warmth that this stylish piece brings to your home. Illuminate your days and nights with grace and sophistication.
